data.name: 悦男侍女录
data.detailed_description:
"Record of Pleasing Male Servants and Female Servants" is a dynamic jigsaw puzzle game. 35 different girls interact with you in various ways - sexy, cute, and innocent. Come and complete their puzzle together!

Gameplay:

■ Click on a fragment with the mouse and drag it to the correct position.

■ Put all the fragments in the correct positions.

■ After the program has been checked and found to be correct, the encyclopedia will be unlocked.

■ Clicking the icon at the bottom right will allow you to view the full image temporarily.

■ The "Save" button on the identification interface allows you to download the pictures to your computer desktop.

Game Features:

■ Dynamic Image

■ The program automatically divides the images

■ The girls' dynamic movements interact with you.

■ Achievement System

■ Optional custom game difficulty options

■ 35 beautiful girls are waiting to be unlocked

■ Images can be downloaded and saved

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win10,11
  • 處理器: i3-12100F
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 默认
  • VR 支援: 不支持
  • 備註: 无
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win11
  • 處理器: i7-14700K
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 4060
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 默认
  • VR 支援: 不支持
  • 備註: 无
